evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all tailwind rules

assertions.trap: Template literal string concatenation for classes
assertions.description: cn() (twMerge + clsx) for conditional/merged classes
cva() for component variants, not manual conditionals
@apply only for base/typography, not component styles
Spacing scale increments of 4 (4,6,8,12,16,24)
Tailwind size classes (text-sm, text-base) not arbitrary px
Never concatenate dynamic classes; use full string maps

assertions.trap: Hex colors #3b82f6 in config and components
assertions.description: OKLCH format for design token colors in @theme
v4: @theme {} in CSS replaces tailwind.config.ts
v4: @import 'tailwindcss' replaces @tailwind directives
v4: auto content detection, never include node_modules
v4: bg-black/50 not bg-opacity-50

assertions.trap: No focus styles on interactive elements
assertions.description: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 on all interactive elements

assertions.trap: Small button without min touch target
assertions.description: 44x44px minimum touch targets on mobile

assertions.trap: MenuButton has icon-only SVG button with no text and no aria-label
assertions.description: sr-only for screen-reader text; icon buttons need aria-label
motion-reduce:transition-none for animations
Only GPU properties (transform, opacity); avoid transition-all
React 19: ref is regular prop, no forwardRef

assertions.trap: Dialog as single component, not compound
assertions.description: Compound component pattern (Dialog.Trigger, Dialog.Content)
Systematic z-index scale (10,20,40,50)
Dark mode with .dark { --color-*: value } overrides

assertions.trap: No responsive variants, fixed width w-[480px]
assertions.description: Mobile-first responsive: base=mobile, add sm:/md:/lg:

assertions.trap: w-8 h-8 on avatar instead of size-8
assertions.description: size-* shorthand when w and h are equal
color-mix() in oklab for semi-transparent color variants

assertions.trap: @theme defines custom colors without clearing defaults first
assertions.description: --color-*: initial to clear defaults before custom palette

assertions.trap: animate-pulse used but no --animate-* tokens or @keyframes in @theme
assertions.description: Animation tokens: --animate-* and @keyframes defined in @theme

assertions.trap: ContainerCard has no @container, children use no @lg: variants
assertions.description: Container queries: @container on parent + @lg:/@2xl: on children

assertions.trap: truncate in grid cells without min-w-0 causes overflow
assertions.description: min-w-0 + truncate in grid cells to prevent overflow

assertions.trap: PriceTag has no contrast-more: variant for high-contrast
assertions.description: contrast-more: variant for high-contrast support

assertions.trap: Skeleton uses bg-gray-300 rounded-sm, not bg-gray-200 rounded-md dark:bg-gray-800
assertions.description: Skeleton: animate-pulse + rounded-md bg-gray-200 dark:bg-gray-800

assertions.trap: Native popover has no @starting-style for entry animation
assertions.description: @starting-style for native popover/entry animations
v4: @custom-variant dark (&:where(.dark, .dark *)) syntax

assertions.trap: body has no bg-background text-foreground; no border-border on *
assertions.description: bg-background text-foreground on body, border-border on *

assertions.trap: Dropdown built from scratch instead of using Radix primitives
assertions.description: Radix primitives for accessible unstyled components

evals.name: new-patterns-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all new Tailwind rules

assertions.trap: bg-blue-500 instead of project design tokens
assertions.description: Iron Law: read @theme config before applying utilities -- use project tokens
Define raw OKLCH values in @theme -- Tailwind wraps oklch() automatically
3+ variants threshold: inline utilities for <3 variants, CVA for 3+
Define z-index tokens in @theme (--z-dropdown, --z-modal etc.)
Prefer tw-animate-css package for standard entrance animations
v4: @plugin directive in CSS replaces plugins array in config
